title: erycibe peguensis
intro: Erycibe peguensis, also known as the Snake Vine, is a type of flowering plant native to Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Erycibe peguensis include reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating digestive issues, making it a valuable herbal remedy in the region. In herbal preparations, Erycibe peguensis is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions that can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
